content.en:
"How could the truncated Black Mountain crack?"

Ye Tian instantly came to the place where the crack was.

At this time, he clearly sensed that this crack was not a simple crack, but led to an unknown place.

"It's not the breath of the truncated forbidden area, this crack is not the entrance to the truncated forbidden area, it's more like ......"

Ye Tian thought of the Xuanqi Realm, because the aura was somewhat similar.

"A small area of the intersection!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

There was also a small area of intersection with the Xuanqi Territory when the forbidden area was cut off before, but it appeared for a short time.

I didn't expect that there was another intersection period here, and judging from the entrance crack, it should also be a small-scale intersection period.

"There is an opportunity at the intersection period, go in and have a look!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Just as he was about to enter, several supreme enhancement levels appeared, all of which were supreme enhancement levels that cut off the forbidden area, including Akagi.

Akagi looked at the crack and quickly recognized the entrance to the intersection as well.

"There's another entrance!"

Akagi was a little surprised.

He was a little curious about where this entrance led, if it was the same place as the gap in the glow, it would be meaningless, but if it was a new territory and contained a lot of resources, it would be valuable!

Of course, the Genki Realm is also dangerous, and if you enter a very dangerous place, it will be easy to fall.

In the previous intersectional period of Panshan Ling, it was also the strong people of the major forces who sent a group of weak people to enter the investigation and take the lead in the trial.

"Your Excellency is the new Supreme Ninefold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building, the Endless Dao Ancestor, right?"

Akagi said.

"That's good!" Ye Tian stared at Akagi and said, "You are Akagi, do you want to go in together?"

Akagi shook his head, "I'm not going in now!"

Ye Tian saw that Chimu was stunned, and he went directly through the entrance of the crack.

Seeing this, Akagi hesitated for a moment, but still stepped into it, otherwise he would be too timid!

He didn't believe that he would be so unlucky, and he would die as soon as he entered.

If you are really in danger, it is a big deal to come back.

......

True mountain collar.

On a black ocean, a figure emerged, and it was Ye Tian.

"Hey, the suppression here is not big, and it is dozens of times stronger than the Silent Black Sea!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He originally thought that this place would be very dangerous, and the Yae Origin Ancestor would be suppressed and shattered if he entered here!

Now it seems that even if a half-step Yae Origin Ancestor enters here, there will be nothing to do, and he can survive here for a long time.

"Judging from the rules, this is indeed the Xuanqi Territory!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

At this time, he could still sense the existence of the crack, but it was not easy to detect.

He wasn't worried that the creatures of the Genki Realm would enter the Silent Black Sea through the rift, because according to repeated tests, the creatures of the Genki Realm could not enter the Silent Black Sea during the confluence period.

As for the reason, he is not clear.

Airplanes!!!!

Akagi also entered here, and after sensing it, he found that there was no danger here, and immediately went out again, and immediately informed the other reinforcement levels.

Suddenly, other enhancement levels also came in.

But for such a short time, Ye Tian had already disappeared.

He wouldn't cooperate with Akagi to explore this place, so he naturally left as soon as possible.

......

Everywhere in the True Mountain Territory, ancient giant cities have risen from the ground, and many living beings live in each giant city.

There are all kinds of races of these creatures, but many of them are mainly in human form, and this human race is not a human race, but a real race.

The True Race is similar to humans, but there are faint scales attached to the skin on their bodies, and their bloodlines are extremely powerful, far from being comparable to the Terrans.

Any True Ancestor has just been born with a strength comparable to that of a Dao Ancestor.

At this time.

Ye Tian silently explored the ancient giant cities one after another, and had a little understanding of this territory.

"True mountain collar!"

Ye Tian explored a small area of the True Mountain Territory and found that this was not an unusual period of convergence.

Because once a meeting period is formed, then a territory or a small area of the Genki Territory will merge with the Silent Black Sea or the Primordial Ancient Sea.

Then this territory will be cut off, and the creatures of other territories in the Genki Territory will not be able to enter here.

But now, it seems that the real mountain collar is not isolated.

"It should have something to do with the truncation of Black Mountain, this time it is the power formed by the truncation of Black Mountain, it should be a space-time rift that forcibly tore apart the Xuanqi Territory, not the intersection period!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If it weren't for the meeting period, he might be able to stay in the True Mountain Territory!

Because it's the intersection period, the crack will disappear.

But if it weren't for the convergence period, this crack would probably have been there forever.

In that case, he can stay in the True Mountain Territory, replicate the creatures of the True Mountain Territory, and disguise himself as a True Clan to stay here.

Then he can look for resources here and bring them back!

"My ability to copy my body, no matter how powerful the immeasurable lifeform is, will never be discovered. The other Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea couldn't do it, they could easily be spotted and then besieged by a group of immeasurable lifeforms. "

Immediately, Ye Tian began to look for a suitable target for replication.

He wants to find a Ninefold Ancestor who doesn't have much entanglement with outsiders, and it's best that few people know him, so that it is not easy to reveal his identity by copying the other party's body.

After a few days of exploration, Ye Tian finally found such a Ninefold Ancestor.

then directly infiltrated the other party's residence, directly killed the other party in seconds, occupied the other party's residence, and then copied the other party's body, claiming to be the other party's identity.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's human copy body left the True Mountain Territory directly.

These days, he has sensed that many immeasurable lifeforms are looking for his existence, if it weren't for the exploration of the copying talent, sensing the other party in advance, so as to silently avoid it, otherwise he would have been discovered a long time ago.

But now, with more and more immeasurable lifeforms looking for him, he knew that he couldn't hide for long, so he had to leave first.

"I don't know if those guys in Akagi have been discovered, if they are discovered, I'm afraid they may not be able to escape!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, he knew the strength of the True Mountain Territory, and any ancient giant city here had immeasurable lifeforms.

......

Somewhere in the real mountain collar.

Akagi and the other three supreme enhancement level were already surrounded, and an immeasurable lifeform appeared around them.

"Trouble!"

Akagi frowned.

This True Mountain Territory is even more powerful than the Panshan Territory, and the immeasurable lifeforms of the True Mountain Territory are not fighting on their own, they know how to unite.

So they were directly surrounded.

The point is, there is no help this time, last time many Xeons entered the Panshan Territory together, and they still take care of each other!

"Run!"

Akagi and the other three to the reinforcement level immediately decided.
